socketedItems.secDescrText: Draws out your own blood to power a buff for a duration, letting this skill inflict the Corrupting Blood debuff on enemies you hit, dealing physical damage over time for a short secondary duration. The buff's duration will be refreshed if you spend enough life before it expires.
explicitMods: Deals 379 Base Physical Damage per second
Buff Duration is refreshed after you spend a total of 210 Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: A bloody scythe swipes across a selected area, applying a physical damage over time debuff and hitting enemies with physical damage. If any survive, you gain a blood charge which raises the damage and cost of the skill. Players can have 5 maximum blood charges.

Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect

Gain a Blood Charge if this Skill Hits Enemies and none of them Die

Costs 20% more Life per Blood Charge
Deals 20% more Damage per Blood Charge

flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

name: The Primordial Chain
explicitMods: +3 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
flavourText: The leash of the lifegiver
binds in both directions.

name: Foulborn Berek's Respite
explicitMods: Adds 21 to 34 Fire Damage to Spells and Attacks
When you Kill an Ignited Enemy, inflict an equivalent Ignite on each nearby Enemy
mutatedMods:
Shocked Enemies you Kill Explode, dealing 6% of
their Life as Lightning Damage which cannot Shock
flavourText: "With Flame licking at his heels
Berek berated the clouds
Until vengeful Storm spewed forth his rains
And Berek held on tight
As Fire screamed and steamed
And fled."
- Berek and the Untamed

name: Lost Unity
explicitMods: Grants Level 30 Herald of the Hive Skill
flavourText: All gates are closed.
All dreams are silenced.
What could have been...

name: Foulborn Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
mutatedMods: Rightmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

name: The Dark Monarch
implicitMods: 0.5% of Lightning Damage Leeched as Life
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems

Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled
Cannot have Minions other than Summoned Golems
flavourText: "Hate? You speak to me of hate? You have no idea what your persecution inflicts.
How it chokes the heart. Withers the soul. Judge me, and you judge yourself."
- Saresh, last words, to Sekhema Orbala

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy

socketedItems.secDescrText: Once activated, continuously spends mana to cause volleys of ethereal weapons rain from the sky around you, dealing damage to enemies they impact. Each Blade will target a separate enemy in the volley area if possible. Each enemy can only be hit once by each volley, even if multiple blades land near them. This skill cannot be triggered or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
